leadership_experiences.titre: Finalist - 2024 McKinsey & Company Sponsored Business Case
leadership_experiences.description: Presented a strategic project to Keyrock’s management and McKinsey consultants in Rabat, developing a data-driven model to forecast black swan events using order book data and statistical arbitrage. The proposal showcased a potential CHF 200K annual revenue gain through predictive insights.
leadership_experiences.skills: data analysis, predictive modeling, statistical arbitrage, financial forecasting, business strategy, strategic presentation, problem-solving under pressure, team collaboration
leadership_experiences.outcomes: Top 5 finalist; potential CHF 200K annual revenue; strengthened analytical and presentation skills

leadership_experiences.description: Led post-COVID financial recovery by sourcing corporate leads, creating tailored pitchbooks, and negotiating partnerships. Closed 3 key deals, generating CHF 60K annual revenue and increasing volunteer placements by 40%.
leadership_experiences.skills: business development, lead generation, sales negotiation, pitchbook creation, resilience, persuasive communication, stakeholder management
leadership_experiences.outcomes: 3 partnerships closed; CHF 60K annual revenue; +40% volunteer placements

leadership_experiences.titre: Founder - Second-Hand Luxury Business (Custom Sneaker Startup)
leadership_experiences.description: Founded and managed a second-hand luxury and custom sneaker business using upcycled materials. Led a 2-person team managing product development, supplier relations in China Shenzhen, and influencer marketing. Achieved profitability within 6 months and built a 500+ follower base.
leadership_experiences.skills: digital marketing, product-market fit, supplier management, social media marketing, leadership, creativity, adaptability, sustainability mindset
leadership_experiences.outcomes: 2-person team; +150% sales growth in first year; 500+ followers; 100+ pairs sold; 5% conversion rate

leadership_experiences.description: Founded and developed Screeny.ai, an AI-driven software for investment banks to identify strategic and financial acquirers. Built full stack (frontend & backend) and led sales outreach to M&A boutiques and private equity firms. Tool adopted by 3 advisory firms, reducing buyer search time from 10h+ to 20min.
leadership_experiences.skills: software development, AI integration, sales strategy, B2B prospecting, product management, entrepreneurship, initiative, strategic communication
leadership_experiences.outcomes: 3 clients signed; ~90% time reduction; +200% user growth in 3 months

leadership_experiences.description: Manages a diversified investment portfolio using Cash Secured Puts and Covered Calls. Executes disciplined options strategies with 45-day expiries to generate consistent income through theta decay while managing portfolio risk via ETFs.
leadership_experiences.skills: options trading, risk management, financial modeling, portfolio optimization, analytical thinking, discipline, strategic decision-making
leadership_experiences.outcomes: +8% annualized returns; 15-20 active positions; CHF 5K+ annual premiums
